progress.approve_hub: **Connecting to {name} through {path}.** A Bluetooth proxy may need up to 90 seconds to open the connection. When the hub asks, approve **Home Assistant** within 60 seconds. This screen advances automatically after approval.
progress.finishing_setup: **The hub approved Home Assistant.** Home Assistant is checking Weber Cloud so the Weber app and Home Assistant can work at the same time. This check can take up to five minutes and updates automatically. No action is needed.

user.title: Choose your Weber hub
user.description: Select the hub you want to add. The route shown beside it tells you which local Bluetooth adapter or active ESPHome proxy currently sees it.

no_devices.title: No Weber hub found
no_devices.description: Home Assistant cannot currently see a connectable Weber hub. Wake the hub, keep it near Home Assistant or an active ESPHome Bluetooth proxy, and search again.

confirm.title: Connect {name}
confirm.description: Fully close the Weber app and temporarily turn off Bluetooth on every phone or tablet that uses it. Wake {name}, then continue. Home Assistant will connect through **{path}**; a Bluetooth proxy may need up to 90 seconds. When the hub asks, approve **Home Assistant** within 60 seconds. Home Assistant will then check Weber Cloud for up to five minutes.

pairing_failed.title: The hub did not approve Home Assistant
pairing_failed.description: Home Assistant did not receive approval from the hub, so no setup was saved. Keep the Weber app closed and phone or tablet Bluetooth off, wake the hub, and try again.

cloud_not_linked.title: The hub is paired, but Weber Cloud has not linked it
cloud_not_linked.description: Local pairing succeeded. Home Assistant reached Weber Cloud and checked automatically for up to five minutes, but the new connection was not given access to this hub. You do not need to approve the hub again. If the hub was just set up again in the Weber app, check once more.

menu_options.retry_cloud: Check Weber Cloud again — up to 5 minutes

cloud_unavailable.title: Weber Cloud could not be reached
cloud_unavailable.description: Local pairing succeeded, but Home Assistant could not complete the online check. The hub does not need approval again. Confirm Home Assistant has internet access and try again. If Weber Cloud is reachable, Home Assistant will wait up to five minutes for the hub.

menu_options.retry_cloud: Try the online check again — up to 5 minutes

setup_failed.title: Setup did not finish
setup_failed.description: Home Assistant encountered an unexpected problem and did not create the integration entry. Check the Home Assistant logs for the exact cause before starting over.

create_entry.default: **Both setup steps are complete.** Turn Bluetooth back on and reopen the Weber app. The phone may use the hub's Bluetooth connection while Home Assistant continues receiving cook data online.

abort.already_configured: This Weber hub is already configured.
abort.already_in_progress: Setup is already open for this Weber hub. Close this window and continue the existing setup.

init.title: Weber Connect settings
init.description: The recommended defaults let the Weber app and Home Assistant work together.

connection.name: Connection
connection.description: Phone + Home Assistant leaves Bluetooth available to the Weber app and receives temperatures online. Home Assistant only keeps the hub's Bluetooth connection through a local adapter or active proxy, so the app cannot use Bluetooth at the same time. Changing modes closes the current connection before starting the other one.

probes.name: Probe names
probes.description: Optional nicknames appear beside the permanent probe number.

connection_lost.title: {name} lost its online connection
connection_lost.description: Home Assistant could not receive new Weber Cloud data after repeated retries.

confirm.title: Retry {name}
confirm.description: Make sure Home Assistant can reach the internet, then continue to test the existing private Weber connection.

error.still_unavailable: No new cloud data arrived. Check Home Assistant's internet connection and try again.
